signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Ballcarriers with this ability have an increased chance to break hit-stick tackle attempts made on them.
Players with this ability will recover from the effects of Wear and Tear and fatigue at an increased rate between plays.
Ballcarriers with this ability retain more of their forward momentum during tackles while travelling at high speeds.
The most physical coverage defenders prevent catches from happening even when their target has hands on the ball. When they enter the zone, they are nearly guaranteed knockouts.
Defenders with this ability have a greater chance of forcing fumbles when landing Perfect Hit Sticks
